title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:6661:run:20260401T165237:8287 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/kerne...
summary_text: `Kernel subagent3` のバウンドリハーサル結果です。`note-thumbnail` タスクは以下で再現できます。 対象ファイル: [scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js), [tests/test-note-thumbnail-gen.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-note-thumbnail-gen.sh), [tests/test-note-semi-auto.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-note-semi-auto.sh) `--dry-run`（副作用なし・設計時検証） - `node scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md --dry-run` - 実測成功JSON（例）: ```json {"success":true,"dryRun":true,"title":"...","path":"/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260401_ai-security-guideline_thumbnail.jpg","overlay":true,"provider":"auto","models":["gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview","gemini-2.5-flash-image"]} ``` - 期待フィールド（成功時）: `success`, `dryRun`, `title`, `path`, `overlay`, `provider`, `models` - 失敗時はstderrに `[note-thumbnail] ...` を出し、JSONは `{"success":false,"error":"...","...(追加)"}` 代表失敗: `Usage: note-thumbnail-gen.js <markdown-file> [--dry-run]`、`markdown file not found`、`title not found in frontmatter`、`thumbnail_prompt not found in frontmatter` `mock-run`（ネットワーク不使用） - `NOTE_THUMBNAIL_MOCK=true node scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md` - 実測成功JSON（例）: ```json {"success":true,"path":"/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260401_ai-security-guideline_thumbnail.jpg","model":"mock-thumbnail","bytes":68} ``` - 期待フィールド（成功時）: `success`, `path`, `model`, `bytes` - `overlay` は出力に含まれません（実装上の仕様） `real-run`（実生成） - `node scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md` - providerを明示: - `NOTE_THUMBNAIL_PROVIDER=manus`（Manus優先） - `NOTE_THUMBNAIL_PROVIDER=gemini`（Gemini固定） - 省略時は `auto`（manusが使えるなら manus、無ければ Gemini） - 成功時JSON（実測）: ```json {"success":true,"path":"/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260401_ai-security-guideline_thumbnail.jpg","provider":"gemini","model":"gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview","bytes":187830,"overlay":true} ``` - 期待フィールド（成功時）: `success`, `path`, `provider`, `model`, `bytes`, `overlay` - 代表失敗シグネチャ（実測）: - `NOTE_THUMBNAIL_PROVIDER=manus` + DNS不通: `{"success":false,"error":"thumbnail generation failed","lastError":"manus: Network error: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND api.manus.im"}` - `NOTE_THUMBNAIL_PROVIDER=gemini NOTE_THUMBNAIL_MODELS=bad-model-123`: `{"success":false,"error":"thumbnail generation failed","lastError":"bad-model-123: fetch failed"}` - `GEMINI_API_KEY` が無い/不正/取得不能時: `{"success":false,"error":"thumbnail generation failed","lastError":"...","...: "GEMINI_API_KEY not set" または fetch failed}`（実行時環境依存） 補助ノート: 実際の再現手順は `bash tests/test-note-thumbnail-gen.sh`（dry-run→mock-runの最小検証）と [tests/test-note-semi-auto.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-note-semi-auto.sh) の順が安全なbounded rehearsalセットです。
